summary:
CA72-4 is listed alongside other biomarkers as a candidate for ovarian cancer detection but lacks direct comparative data on levels in ovarian endometriomas versus epithelial ovarian cancers. Without demonstrated discriminatory power or established thresholds, it cannot reliably differentiate these two conditions and has limited value in their clinical differentiation.  

\boxed{\text{B}}

\boxed{\text{B}}. Answer choice: B
